title: Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY OSU IMPACT IMPACT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a physical activity program. Participants engage in activities such as swimming, dancing, ball games, climbing wall challenges, and balance exercises. Each child receives individualized attention, support, and encouragement from specially trained OSU undergraduate volunteers or graduate students. 123 Women's Building Corvallis, OR 97331 Eligibility: Serves children with special needs ages 6 months–21. Some services are available for individuals age 21 and older with special needs Hours: School year: Friday 5:30pm-7pm Summer hours: Friday 9:30am-11am Email (541) 737-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE UNIVERSITY IMPACT
